projectUpgradeModal.title: Upgrade to Skapp Core
projectUpgradeModal.descriptionPart1: You can only create up to <bold>5 projects</bold> on the Free plan. Upgrade to Skapp Core to create more projects and scale your work without limits.
projectUpgradeModal.descriptionPartTwoSuperAdmin: Experience the full potential of Skapp by upgrading to Skapp Core.
projectUpgradeModal.descriptionPartTwoPmAdmin: Please contact your administrator to unlock this feature for your organization.
